title: 「Adverb 比較句 Comparative」

omissions: Physical page 21 is blank and is therefore excluded from answerPages.
The PDF presents most rule and benefit explanations in Traditional Chinese; their complete English fields are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + verb + comparative adverb + than + comparison

formulas.formula: Subject + verb + comparative adverb + than + comparison

example: This song lets me understand the culture more deeply.
exampleZh: 這首歌讓我更深入地理解那種文化。

examples.en: This song lets me understand the culture more deeply.
examples.zh: 這首歌讓我更深入地理解那種文化。

meaning.zh: 主語＋動詞＋副詞比較級＋than＋比較對象。比較對象十分明顯時，than + comparison 可以省略。

rules.zh: 副詞用來描述「動作怎樣進行」。形容詞通常描述人或事物；副詞則描述動詞所代表的動作。
rules.en: Adverbs describe how an action is performed. Adjectives normally describe people or things, whereas adverbs describe the action expressed by a verb.
examples: Adverb: She explained the idea more clearly.

rules.zh: 短副詞通常加 -er，例如 fast → faster、hard → harder、early → earlier、late → later。
rules.en: Short adverbs normally add -er, for example fast → faster, hard → harder, early → earlier and late → later.

rules.zh: 以 -ly 結尾的副詞通常使用 more 或 less，例如 more carefully、more clearly、more quietly、more frequently 和 less calmly。不要寫 carefullier、more faster 或 more earlier。
rules.en: Adverbs ending in -ly normally use more or less, for example more carefully, more clearly, more quietly, more frequently and less calmly. Do not write carefullier, more faster or more earlier.

rules.zh: 部分副詞有不規則比較級：well → better、badly → worse、far → farther / further。
rules.en: Some adverbs have irregular comparative forms: well → better, badly → worse and far → farther / further.
examples: Ruby performed better in the second interview.

rules.zh: than 後面必須清楚指出比較對象。也可以比較不同時間或情況。
rules.en: The comparison after than must be clear. You may also compare different times or situations.
examples: The new printer works more quietly than the old one.
Grace speaks more fluently than she did six months ago.

rules.zh: 比較對象明顯時，可以省略 than。語境可以表示「比原先」或「比沒有這樣做時」程度更高。
rules.en: When the comparison is obvious, than may be omitted. The context can imply a comparison with an earlier state or with the situation without the action.
examples: This song helps me understand the culture more deeply.

benefits.zh: 清楚比較兩個動作。這個句型不只比較兩個人或事物，還可以比較他們做事的方式，並更準確指出比較的是哪一種動作。
benefits.en: It clearly compares two actions. The structure compares not only people or things but also how they perform an action, identifying the exact action more precisely.

benefits.zh: 描述進步或轉變。副詞比較級可以說明一個人現在做某件事比以前做得更好、更快或更仔細，適合描述學習進度、工作改善和能力發展。
benefits.en: It describes improvement or change by showing that someone now performs an action better, faster or more carefully than before. This is useful for learning progress, workplace improvement and skill development.
examples: Grace speaks English more fluently now than six months ago.

benefits.zh: 把較長的說法變得簡潔。可以直接用一個比較副詞取代較長的 in a more … way，令句子更自然和直接。
benefits.en: It makes a longer expression concise. A comparative adverb can replace a longer in a more … way phrase, making the sentence more natural and direct.
examples: Instead of: She completed the task in a more efficient way than before.
Use: She completed the task more efficiently than before.

benefits.zh: 更準確地說明表現差異。你可以指出某人不只是「比較好」，而是在甚麼方面做得比較好，讓讀者看出比較的是做事方式而不是整體能力。
benefits.en: It explains differences in performance more precisely. You can show not merely that someone is better, but the particular way in which the action is performed better.
examples: The doctor examined the patient more thoroughly than the assistant did.

benefits.zh: 適合用於說話、作文和報告。副詞比較級可以比較學習方法、工作效率、服務表現、科技產品及日常行為，讓解釋更具體；它能準確說明一件事在哪一方面有所改善。
benefits.en: It is suitable for speaking, essays and reports. Comparative adverbs can compare learning methods, work efficiency, service performance, technology products and everyday behaviour, making explanations more specific and showing exactly how something is better.
examples: The new system processes information more efficiently.

sourceOmissions: Physical page 21 is blank and contains no answer content.
Complete English rule and benefit explanations are faithful editorial translations where the PDF supplies the teaching explanation only in Traditional Chinese.

en: Rewrite each sentence using a comparative adverb.
Preserve the original meaning and comparison.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用副詞比較級改寫以下句子。
改寫時須保留原句的意思及比較關係。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Mia’s singing is more confident now than it was last year.
questions.promptZh: 米婭現在唱歌時比去年更有自信。
questions.answer: Mia sings more confidently now than she did last year.
questions.answerZh: 米婭現在唱歌比去年更有自信。
questions.highlight: Mia sings more confidently now than she did last year.

questions.prompt: Ben runs at a higher speed than Leo.
questions.promptZh: 本跑步的速度比里奧高。
questions.answer: Ben runs faster than Leo.
questions.answerZh: 本跑得比里奧快。
questions.highlight: Ben runs faster than Leo.

questions.prompt: The new printer makes less noise while working than the old one.
questions.promptZh: 新打印機運作時發出的聲音比舊打印機少。
questions.answer: The new printer works more quietly than the old one.
questions.answerZh: 新打印機運作時比舊打印機更安靜。
questions.highlight: The new printer works more quietly than the old one.

questions.prompt: Ava reads with greater care than her brother.
questions.promptZh: 艾娃閱讀時比她的哥哥更加仔細。
questions.answer: Ava reads more carefully than her brother.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃閱讀時比她的哥哥更仔細。
questions.highlight: Ava reads more carefully than her brother.

questions.prompt: Our arrival was earlier than the other group’s.
questions.promptZh: 我們到達的時間比另一組早。
questions.answer: We arrived earlier than the other group.
questions.answerZh: 我們比另一組更早到達。

questions.prompt: The light from this lamp is brighter than the light from that one.
questions.promptZh: 這盞燈發出的光比那盞燈明亮。
questions.answer: This lamp shines more brightly than that one.
questions.answerZh: 這盞燈比那盞燈照得更明亮。
questions.highlight: This lamp shines more brightly than that one.

questions.prompt: Daniel’s answer was more polite than his earlier answers.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾這次的回答比他之前的回答更有禮貌。
questions.answer: Daniel answered more politely than before.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾回答得比以前更有禮貌。
questions.highlight: Daniel answered more politely than before.

questions.prompt: The children showed greater attention during the second story than during the first.
questions.promptZh: 孩子們聽第二個故事時比聽第一個故事時更加專心。
questions.answer: The children listened more attentively during the second story than during the first.
questions.answerZh: 孩子們聽第二個故事時比聽第一個故事時更專心。
questions.highlight: The children listened more attentively during the second story than during the first.

questions.prompt: My phone takes less time to charge than yours.
questions.promptZh: 我的手機充電所需的時間比你的短。
questions.answer: My phone charges more quickly than yours.
questions.answerZh: 我的手機比你的充電更快。
questions.highlight: My phone charges more quickly than yours.

questions.prompt: Grace’s spoken English is more fluent now than it was six months ago.

questions.answer: Grace speaks English more fluently now than she did six months ago.

questions.highlight: Grace speaks English more fluently now than she did six months ago.

questions.prompt: Ruby’s performance in the second interview was better than her performance in the first.

questions.prompt: Why was Alan the first person to finish? His way of working was more efficient than everyone else’s.
questions.promptZh: 艾倫為甚麼最先完成？他的工作方式比其他人更有效率。
questions.answer: Alan finished first because he worked more efficiently than everyone else.

questions.prompt: On the second attempt, the teacher used a lower speaking speed while repeating the example so that everyone could follow it.
questions.promptZh: 老師第二次重複例子時降低了說話速度，讓所有人都能跟上。

questions.highlight: The new reading method helps students understand difficult passages more deeply than before.

questions.prompt: To avoid errors, you should give the figures a closer check than you gave them in the first draft.
questions.promptZh: 為了避免錯誤，你應該比檢查初稿時更仔細地檢查數字。

questions.prompt: Even though both teams trained hard, the home team’s adaptation to the wet conditions was quicker than the visitors’.
questions.promptZh: 雖然兩支球隊都努力訓練，但主隊適應濕滑環境的速度比客隊快。

questions.promptZh: 有了新設備後，醫院可以用比以前更短的時間治理急症病人。
questions.answer: The hospital can now treat emergency patients more rapidly than before because of the new equipment.
questions.answerZh: 由於有了新設備，醫院現在可以比以前更迅速地治理急症病人。

questions.promptZh: 使用修訂後的指示設定裝置時，用戶所需的協助比使用舊指示時少。

questions.promptZh: 辯論隊在決賽中回應相反觀點時，比練習期間更加深思熟慮。
questions.answer: The debate team responded more thoughtfully to opposing views in the final than during practice.
questions.answerZh: 辯論隊在決賽中回應相反觀點時，比練習期間更加深思熟慮。

questions.prompt: Researchers make a more objective judgement when they compare several sources than when they rely on one report.
questions.promptZh: 研究人員比較多個資料來源時，所作的判斷比只依賴一份報告時客觀。
questions.answer: By comparing several sources, researchers can judge a claim more objectively than by relying on one report.
questions.answerZh: 透過比較多個資料來源，研究人員可以比只依賴一份報告更客觀地判斷一項說法。
questions.highlight: By comparing several sources, researchers can judge a claim more objectively than by relying on one report.

questions.prompt: Before choosing the revised plan, the committee gave the long-term risks a more careful examination than it had given them before.
questions.promptZh: 委員會選擇修訂方案前，比以往更加仔細地審視長遠風險。
questions.answer: Before choosing the revised plan, the committee examined the long-term risks more carefully than it had before.
questions.answerZh: 委員會選擇修訂方案前，比以往更加仔細地審視長遠風險。
questions.highlight: Before choosing the revised plan, the committee examined the long-term risks more carefully than it had before.
